AI Writing Tools

Honest reviews of AI writing assistants. Tested by someone who actually writes for a living.

Quick Comparison

Tool Maker Rating Price Best For
ChatGPT (GPT-4o/GPT-5) OpenAI ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.3 Free / $20/mo Best for quick drafts and brainstorming
Claude (Sonnet 4/Opus) Anthropic ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.6 Free / $20/mo Best for long-form and nuanced writing
Gemini Google ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.2 Free / $20/mo Best integrated with Google Workspace
Jasper AI Jasper ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.0 $49/mo Best dedicated blog writing tool, but pricey
Grammarly AI Grammarly ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.2 Free / $12/mo Essential editing and grammar companion
Wordtune AI21 Labs ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.0 Free / $9.99/mo Best for sentence rewriting and polishing
Rytr Rytr ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3.8 Free / $9/mo Budget-friendly short-form copy generator
